description_long: This is a freestanding, modern shelving unit with a distinctive arched frame in black and three wooden shelves arranged asymmetrically. The shelves are supported by vertical dividers, creating multiple open compartments for storage or display. The frame is solid and curves smoothly over the top, enclosing the shelves on the sides and back while leaving the front open for easy access. The wood grain of the shelves contrasts with the matte black frame, giving the piece a contemporary yet natural look. The sides are solid and opaque, providing structural support and a sense of enclosure. This unit is suitable for use on sidewalks, in parks, or urban interiors as a display or storage solution.
description: A modern, arched black shelving unit with three wooden shelves and open front access. The design features a solid frame and asymmetrical shelf arrangement for display or storage.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open access, three wooden shelves, and vertical dividers within the black arched frame.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the solid, opaque black frame with no visible shelves or compartments.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, showing the shelves and dividers through the arched frame, but with less visibility of the open compartments.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the solid black frame with no visible shelves.
